name: autonomous-fleet
description: Portable multi-agent engineering framework for fully-autonomous coding runs across orchestration tools. A tool-agnostic core engine, per-runtime adapters (Claude Code, Codex, Grok, Orca), and 3 shipped mission skills (doc-sync, test-coverage, adversarial-review-and-fix) that compose into multi-step engineering campaigns; 12 more missions ship as exploratory docs pending real-run promotion, plus a standalone fleet-verify CLI/GitHub Action that replays the verification layers on any run directory.
